scripts.build:client: npm run build:meta && vite build --config config/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:bundle: npm run build:meta && tsc -b config/tsconfig.json && vite build --config config/vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:edge: npm run build:client && npx wrangler pages dev dist --d1 DB=linksim --r2 AVATAR_BUCKET=linksim-avatars --binding ALLOW_INSECURE_DEV_AUTH=true --binding DEV_AUTH_USER_ID=local-dev-user --binding ADMIN_USER_IDS=local-dev-user --local --persist-to .wrangler/state
scripts.build: npm run build:meta && npm run build:bundle
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:verify && node scripts/deploy-pages-safe.mjs --target staging
scripts.deploy:staging:preview: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:verify && node scripts/deploy-pages-safe.mjs --target staging-preview
scripts.deploy:prod:main: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:verify && node scripts/deploy-pages-safe.mjs --target prod-main
scripts.refresh:staging: npm run refresh:staging:d1 && npm run refresh:staging:r2
scripts.refresh-and-deploy:staging: npm run refresh:staging && npm run deploy:staging:main
